eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CIVIL EMERGENCY MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Gilliam, OR; at 3:04 PM on JUL 17, 2026 Effective until 5:04 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Wildfire Alert from Wheeler County Sheriff's Office. Level 3 - GO NOW - Evacuate immediately from the following areas: Level 3 - GO NOW evacuation issued for Rowe Complex fires south of Pine Creek Rd, west of Dry Hollow Road, north of John Day River, and east of Jefferson county line (between John Day River and Hay Bottom Canyon).
